---
output: hugodown::md_document
title: "Heartbleed"
date: 2020-08-10
trailer: "gallery/heartbleed/preview/turmite_52.png"
splash:
  image: "gallery/heartbleed/extra/turmite_52.jpg"
  caption: "Heartbleed"
---

```{r include=FALSE}
source("../../diziet.R")
```

> The limits of your language become the limits of my world

```{r echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
diziet$make_gallery()
```

<br><br>

The [turmite59](https://github.com/djnavarro/turmite59) package.
